recipes.name: Flamescale
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Adamantine material type. On hit: 15d6 Fire Damage.

recipes.name: Icescale
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Cold Iron material type. On hit: 15d6 Cold Damage.

recipes.name: Sparkscale
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Silver material type. On hit: 15d6 Electric Damage.

recipes.name: Meltscale
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Crystal and Byeshk material type. On hit: 15d6 Acid Damage.

recipes.name: Brightscale
recipes.effectRaw: +9 Enhancement bonus to Spell Penetration. (Bugged, provide Equipment bonus really) If this is slotted in a Quarterstaff, also grants a +2 Exceptional bonus to Spell DCs and makes the Quarterstaff an Implement.

recipes.name: Shadowscale
recipes.effectRaw: +10% Enhancement bonus to Spell Cost Reduction. If this is slotted in a Quarterstaff, also grants a +2 Exceptional bonus to Spell DCs and makes the Quarterstaff an Implement.

recipes.name: Iridiscent Scale
recipes.effectRaw: +102 Equipment bonus to all Spellpowers. If this is slotted in a Quarterstaff, also grants a +2 Exceptional bonus to Spell DCs and makes the Quarterstaff an Implement.

recipes.name: Flamefang
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Good alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells have a small chance to deal a large amount of Fire damage. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Fire Attunement)

recipes.name: Icefang
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Chaotic alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells have a chance to inflict ten stacks of Cold damage over time. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Water Attunement)

recipes.name: Sparkfang
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Lawful alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells have a small chance to deal a massive amount of Electric damage. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Air Attunement)

recipes.name: Meltfang
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Evil alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells deal a large amount of stacking Acid damage over time. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Earth Attunement)

recipes.name: Brightfang
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to deal Untyped damage. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Steam)

recipes.name: Shadowfang
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to apply a Curse that deals significant Untyped damage over time. (undocumented) (Untyped damage DOT with 6d6+6 damage every 2 seconds for 12 sec, consecutive attacks extend duration to 1 min 25 sec)

recipes.name: Iridiscent Fang
recipes.effectRaw: +5 Equipment bonus to all Spell DCs. If this is slotted in a Quarterstaff, also grants a +5% Exceptional bonus to Spell Critical Chance and makes the Quarterstaff an Implement.

recipes.effectRaw: +2 Exceptional bonus to Strength.

recipes.effectRaw: +2 Exceptional bonus to Wisdom.

recipes.effectRaw: +2 Exceptional bonus to Charisma.

recipes.name: Meltclaw
recipes.effectRaw: +2 Exceptional bonus to Constitution.

recipes.name: Brightclaw
recipes.effectRaw: +2 Exceptional bonus to Intelligence.

recipes.name: Shadowclaw
recipes.effectRaw: +2 Exceptional bonus to Dexterity.

recipes.name: Flamehorn
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to reduce enemy Magical Resistance Rating and Universal Spell Power. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Ash)

recipes.name: Icehorn
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to freeze your target in a block of ice. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Ice)

recipes.name: Sparkhorn
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to inflict multiple stacks of Vulnerability. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Vacuum)

recipes.name: Melthorn
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to reduce enemy Physical Resistance Rating and Positive Healing Amplification. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Dust)

recipes.name: Brighthorn
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to grant you 1,000 Temporary HP. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Affirmation)

recipes.name: Shadowhorn
recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to reduce enemy Physical and Magical Resistance Rating. (undocumented) (Grants a version of Constricting Nightmare that works with spells)

recipes.name: Horn: Resistance
recipes.effectRaw: +12 Resistance bonus to all Saving Throws. (undocumented) This bonus is instead +11.

recipes.name: Horn: Enhanced Ghostly
recipes.effectRaw: Equipping this item causes you to become partially incorporeal. Your melee and missile attacks do not roll a miss chance for Incorporeal targets. Enemy attacks have a 15% chance to miss you due to your incorporeality. You receive a +5 enhancement bonus to your Hide and Move Silently skills.

recipes.name: Horn: Relentless Fury
recipes.effectRaw: While this item is equipped, any killing blows you strike against enemies may drive you into a furious rage, providing a 5% Enhancement damage bonus to your melee, ranged, and unarmed attacks for 30 seconds. Slaying weaker opponents has a reduced chance of producing this effect.

recipes.name: Horn: Armor Piercing
recipes.effectRaw: +22% Enhancement bonus to Fortification bypass. (undocumented) If slotted into a Minor Artifact, this bonus is instead +24%.

recipes.name: Horn: Wizardry
recipes.effectRaw: +286 Enhancement bonus to Maximum SP.

recipes.name: Horn: Profane DCs
recipes.effectRaw: You have a +2 Profane bonus to Spell DCs.

recipes.name: Horn: Sacred DCs
recipes.effectRaw: You have a +2 Sacred bonus to Spell DCs.

recipes.name: Bronzescale
recipes.effectRaw: You have Deathblock and are Ghostly.

recipes.effectRaw: +150% Enhancement bonus to Fortification.

recipes.effectRaw: +2d6 Profane bonus to your Sneak Attack Dice.

recipes.name: Silverfang
recipes.effectRaw: +2 Profane bonus to Spell DCs, Tactical DCs, and Assassinate.

recipes.name: Voidfang
recipes.effectRaw: +15 Exceptional bonus to Potency.

recipes.name: Aspect of Tar
recipes.effectRaw: Horn (Weapon)
costRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to reduce enemy PRR and MRR and summon Tar oozes to your aid. (Grants Legendary Ooze but summons a CR 52 Tar Bubble)

recipes.name: Black Sands' Desire
recipes.effectRaw: Horn (Weapon)
costRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to significantly slow your enemies. (Grants limited version of Legendary Salt, provide 1 stack instead 8)

recipes.name: Fragment of Extraplanar Alignment
recipes.effectRaw: Scale (Armor)
costRaw: +23% Enhancement bonus to Alignment absorption, which includes Law, Chaos, Good, and Evil damage.

recipes.effectRaw: Scale (Armor)
costRaw: +3% Profane Doublestrike and Doubleshot, +15% Enhancement bonus to Melee Alacrity, +20% Enhancement bonus to Ranged Alacrity.

recipes.effectRaw: Horn (Accessory)
